raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 1137 will force thousands of oil wells to stop producing.",
    "California will have to import more oil from countries like Ecuador and Saudi Arabia.",
    "Ecuador, where California gets 55 percent of its imported oil, has few environmental safeguards.",
    "Ecuador is bulldozing down the Amazon rainforest to meet California’s demand for oil.",
    "The actions taken by the Governor will continue to finance human rights abuses in Saudi Arabia.",
    "California oil producers operate under the most stringent environmental and regulatory rules in the world.",
    "Much of the oil imported by California could be replaced by in-state producers, providing California jobs."
  ]
}
```
